ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "subspecies" TEXT /* Subspecies if applicable */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* The taxonomic rank of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* The conservation status of the species */,
  "invasive_status" TEXT /* The invasive status of the species */,
  "ecological_impact" TEXT /* A brief description of the ecological impact of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species observed */,
  "county" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the observation was made */,
  "regions" TEXT /* Regions of the observation */,
  "landscape" TEXT /* Landscape type of the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of observation */,
  "gps" TEXT /* GPS coordinates */,
  "habitat" INTEGER /* Reference to the habitat type */,
  "col_method" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection method */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of observation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of observation */,
  "decade" INTEGER /* Decade of observation */,
  "hdecade" TEXT /* Half-decade representation */,
  "decade30" TEXT /* 30-year period representation */,
  "invasion" TEXT /* Invasion status */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the observation */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the museum where the specimen is stored */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the observation */,
  "notes_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the notes related to the observation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_col_method FOREIGN KEY ("col_method") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_notes_id FOREIGN KEY ("notes_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_habitat FOREIGN KEY ("habitat") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "museums" (
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each museum */,
  "museum_name" TEXT /* Name of the museum */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the museum */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the museum */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the museum */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the museum's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the museum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the source */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat type */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the habitat */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the habitat */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the habitat in square kilometers */,
  "climatic_conditions" TEXT /* A description of the climatic conditions of the habitat */,
  "vegetation" TEXT /* A description of the vegetation in the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* A list of equipment needed for the collection method */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* A detailed description of the procedure for the collection method */,
  "advantages" TEXT /* The advantages of the collection method */,
  "disadvantages" TEXT /* The disadvantages of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation the note is related to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the note */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
